message:
fix(probabilistic): maintain floor invariant post-scale and harden stopping certificate

- bayesian_posterior: re-floor each probability component with .max(FLOOR_MASS)
  after scaling by multiplier, ensuring floor invariant is maintained when
  scale pushes a component below the floor before remainder distribution
- execution_orchestrator: include STOPPING_SCHEMA_VERSION as first field in
  OptimalStoppingCertificate cert_data; extract CUSUM statistic and ARL0
  lower bound to locals to avoid double-calling arl0_lower_bound(); match
  StoppingDecision on string literal instead of Debug format

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
